title: [Cobblemon] Jet's Stick and Apple
description: Jet's take on a Minecraft-inspired Cobblemon Region
body:
# Explore the Perbemia Region!

Pokemon Stick and Apple is a **fakemon** addon that is directly related and influenced by minecraft, featuring fakemon versions of minecraft items, mobs and blocks etc! Can you find them all? 

Currently this addon has the three starters, and the early route pokemon (bird, bug, mammal and plant)

Special thank you to both Curious Cryptid and Synthwave Crusader who helped with all things competitive and battle!

Screenshots taken in game and shown directly to me on discord could appear in the gallery of the modrinth page! So don't miss out!

<details>
<summary>Evo Methods</summary>

Oakabaa -> Muttree [lvl 18]

Muttree -> Forestram [lvl 36]

Moocoal -> Boven [lvl 18]

Boven -> Smeltaur [lvl 36]

Oinkelp -> Sailswine [lvl 18]

Sailswine -> Shipwroink [lvl 36]

Sculgrub -> Shriekoon [lvl 19]

Shriekoon -> Scaraden [lvl 49]

Clukegg -> Roostama [lvl 16]

Roostama -> Clukududuldu [lvl 33]

Foxini -> Vixense [lvl 31]

Appoll -> Gloppoll [lvl 22]

Gloppoll -> Notchraple [lvl 41]

</details>
this addon is not to be used on public servers without my permission - please message me on discord if you wish to feature my addon!!

However: you may use this addon on any youtube videos, or online posts (in fact I encourage it!) as long as you give proper credit to the addon and link to this page! <3
